headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: MIAMI, May 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH) (together with NCL Corporation Ltd. (“NCLC”), “Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings”, “Norwegian”, “NCLH” or the “Company”) today reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 and provided guidance for the second quarter and full year 2026.
